questions.text: Which of these is a good conductor of electricity?
questions.explanation: Copper is a metal and a good conductor of electricity. Rubber, wood, and distilled water are insulators.

questions.text: Electroplating is based on chemical effect of electric current.
questions.explanation: Electroplating uses the chemical effect of electric current to deposit a layer of metal on another object.

questions.correctAnswer: The decomposition of a substance by passing electric current through its solution.
questions.explanation: Electrolysis is the chemical decomposition produced by passing electric current through a conducting solution.

questions.text: The electrode connected to positive terminal is called ________.
questions.explanation: Anode is the positive electrode, cathode is the negative electrode in an electrolytic cell.
